title: Default Dark Mode: Brewing Guide Sidebar
description: Potion recipe guide for the brewing stand with the look of Default Dark Mode
body:
This pack is a version of [carl_classic](https://modrinth.com/user/carl_classic)'s pack [Brewing Guide Sidebar](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brewing-guide-sidebar) to fit with the look of [nebulr](https://modrinth.com/user/nebulr)'s [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode).
For this pack to work correctly, the original [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode) pack does't need to be loaded. However, it will look somewhat odd without it, as only the sidebar will be dark, while the rest keeps the normal vanilla style.
Supported Languages - English - Afrikaans - Arabic - Asturianu - Azərbaycanca - Spanish (España) - Spanish (Argentina) - Spanish (Chile) - Spanish (Ecuador) - Spanish (México) - Spanish (Uruguay) - Spanish (Venezuela) - Czech (Česko) - Danish (Danmark) - Deitsch (Österreich) - Swiss German (Schwiiz) - German (Deutschland) - French (France) - Swedish (Svenska) - Maltese (Malti) - Norwegian Nynorsk (Noreg) - Norwergian Bokmål (Norge) - Polish (Polska) - Silesian (Gōrny Ślōnsk) - Portugese (Brasil) - Portugese (Portugal) - Romanian (România) - Russian (Россия) - Ukrainian (Україна)
## Showcase: ![Showcase (DDM + DDM Brewing Guide)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c205e5d6eb8d3cde2d3fbd5f2b4d7d7d17da3a5e.png)
